articles.author: Al Jazeera
articles.title: Nepal’s youngest premier sworn in after releasing new rap song about unity - Al Jazeera
articles.description: At 35, Balen Shah becomes Nepal’s first Madhesi prime minister, representing the southern plains bordering India.
articles.content:
Balendra Shah, Nepals youngest prime minister, has been sworn in after his partys landslide election victory following protests led by young people that toppled the government in September.
A rapper… [+2506 chars]
